summary: Three ads live in the learning phase — Ad 05, 06, 07. Insufficient data yet for firm kill decisions. No real leads generated this week. Hold for another 3 days before acting on any creative.
topInsight: Campaign is in learning phase. Do not make changes until each ad has 50+ link clicks. Pulling the plug now wastes the learning data Meta has already collected.

decisions.reason: Highest CTR of the three. Direct problem-mirror hook performing as expected. Give it more spend.
Insufficient data. Towards-motivator angle — needs 48h of spend before assessment.
Away motivator. Monitor CTR vs Ad 06 — same angle, different framing. Kill the weaker one once data is in.

nextAction: Return Thursday with 3-day CTR data. If Ad 06 CTR > 5% and others < 3%, pause the laggards.

accountHealth.notes: Pixel firing correctly. Learning phase active. Budget adequate at $66/day. Old agency pixels still on site — remove these to clean up attribution.
